# Module 00 — References

## Official exam pages (snowflake.com)
- [SnowPro Associate: Platform](https://www.snowflake.com/en/learn/certifications/snowpro-associate-platform/) — SOL-C01 canonical page.
- [SnowPro Core](https://www.snowflake.com/en/learn/certifications/snowpro-core/) — COF-C02 canonical page.
- [SnowPro Advanced: Data Engineer](https://www.snowflake.com/en/learn/certifications/snowpro-advanced-data-engineer/) — DEA-C02 canonical page.
- [All Snowflake certifications](https://www.snowflake.com/en/learn/certifications/)
- [Snowflake University](https://learn.snowflake.com/)

## Official study guide PDFs
- *SnowPro Associate: Platform (SOL-C01) Study Guide*, last updated June 9, 2025 — exam code, format, duration, and weights on p. 4; domain detail pp. 5-8; sample questions p. 9. Download from [Snowflake certification study guides](https://www.snowflake.com/certifications/).
- *SnowPro Core (COF-C02) Study Guide*, last updated August 22, 2025 — target audience p. 4; weights p. 5; domain detail pp. 6-12; sample questions p. 13. Download from [Snowflake certification study guides](https://www.snowflake.com/certifications/).
- *SnowPro Advanced: Data Engineer (DEA-C02) Study Guide*, last updated March 6, 2026 — overview pp. 2-3; Core prerequisite p. 4; weights p. 4; domain detail pp. 5-10; sample questions p. 12. Download from [Snowflake certification study guides](https://www.snowflake.com/certifications/).

## Additional sources
- Exam attribute table (questions, duration, fees, study guide dates) — see the [Snowflake certification guide](https://www.snowflake.com/certifications/).
- Time-per-question and review-buffer guidance — see each exam's official certification page.
- Retake wait and break policy — see the [Snowflake certification guide](https://www.snowflake.com/certifications/).
- Certification expiry and Core-before-DEA timing — see the [Snowflake certification guide](https://www.snowflake.com/certifications/).
- Exam fees and total cost planning — see the [Snowflake certification guide](https://www.snowflake.com/certifications/).

## Registration flow
Snowflake -> Certification portal -> redirected to Pearson VUE -> choose test center (in-person) or OnVUE (online proctored). Confirm the exam code matches (SOL-C01 / COF-C02 / DEA-C02) before paying.

## Policy note
All values in `README.md` are copied from the PDFs above or the [Snowflake certification guide](https://www.snowflake.com/certifications/). COF-C02 duration (115 min) and question count (100) are not printed on the PDF pages reviewed — they are based on community reports; verify current counts on the Snowflake certification page before scheduling. Per `../../../docs/REUSE_POLICY.md`, treat these as verify-before-scheduling rather than authoritative.
